title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners
company: The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners!
